title: Der Himmel auf Erden
writer: Wilhelm Jacobi, Arthur Lippschütz, Alfred Schirokauer
actors: Reinhold Schünzel, Charlotte Ander, Adele Sandrock
plot: Reinhold Schünzel plays the rigid representative Traugott Bellmann, who publicly condemns the low morals of the night life. Although Belmann's stance is supported by his wife, he is strongly opposed by his father-in-law, a champag...
